GameConditionDef.label: Assault in progress
GameConditionDef.description: Try assault accurate, every citizen life is silver bonus for you.
GameConditionDef.endMessage: Assault is over! The factory is under your control.
GameConditionDef.letterText: The assault begun.\n\n Try do not kill citizens, destroy production machinery and equipment. The less destruction you cased, the more will be reward.
